# UriTemplateMatcher.TryMatch method

Attempts to match *uri* against the template, recovering each variable's value.

```csharp
public bool TryMatch(string uri, out IReadOnlyDictionary<string, string> variables)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| uri | The concrete URI to match. |
| variables | When matched, the recovered `name → value` map (later duplicates win). |

## Return Value

`true` when the URI matches.
